name: Menu Plan Project
desc:
Simple Trello template to manage Software implementations.

1. Use Requirment Discussion for requirements gathering phase.
2. Order the items based on priority in each list.
3. Tracking every user story as a Trello card.
4. Convey accurate state of the user story in each list as Card Labels.

Some quick tips to make the most out of this template:

- Use this board as mind map of team members along with other tools that your business might need.
- Define roles, a fix meeting schedule (10-15 mins a week) to quickly fix the board by a team guardian.
- All communications needs to flow in board for greater transparency.

Author: [shubhamsonar.com](https://www.shubhamsonar.com "‌")
